description: Verso: Opening of a letter from Sherira Gaon sent to Qayrawān. Dating: ca. 970 CE. This is a continuation from the first part of the opening, in T-S 12.370. (Gil, Kingdom, vol. 2, Doc. #22.) VMR. But Gil does not seem right that the two fragments are actually joins with each other.
description_he: פתיחת מכתב משרירא גאון לקיירואן, כ-970, המשך מהחלק הראשון בT-S 12.370
